title: Colorful Plant-Based Quinoa Bowl with Roasted Vegetables and Avocado
description: Top view of a vibrant plant-based quinoa bowl featuring roasted sweet potatoes, Brussels sprouts, cherry tomatoes, red onions, avocado slices, leafy greens, chickpeas, pumpkin seeds, edamame, and purple cabbage, drizzled with a light dressing. The bowl is placed on a rustic wooden table with natural lighting, showcasing fresh and healthy ingredients perfect for meal prep or healthy eating.
